svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="cross-end" id="ce1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-125" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1150" pageHeight="400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="阶段 1 小程序端 automator

下单产出 orderId
bridge.set 写握手" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="240" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bridge" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="跨端桥接层

HANDSHAKE ORDER 记录
stage + orderId
wait / set" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="260" x="420" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="阶段 2 运营后台 Playwright

bridge.wait 查订单
断言运营端可见" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="240" x="800" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="阶段 3 服务端校验
断言 status SETTLED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="420" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;" target="bridge" value="写握手"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="bridge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;" target="s2" value="读握手"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="bridge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;" target="s3" value="读握手"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="各端各测各的会漏掉端与端的数据断裂 跨端编排才补上这块" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="540" x="300" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
